## Summary

- What changed
- Why it changed

## Review Focus

- Primary risk areas for reviewers to focus on
- Any behavior/API/migration changes that need extra attention

## Changed Files

- List key files touched and impact

## Validation

- Commands run:
  - `...`
- Results:
  - pass/fail + key output

## Assumptions / Risks

- Assumptions made
- Remaining risks or follow-up needed

## Code Review

- [ ] I reviewed changed files for correctness and edge cases
- [ ] I reviewed security implications (auth/validation/data handling)
- [ ] I reviewed backward compatibility/API impact
- [ ] I confirmed validation evidence is complete and accurate

## AI Guidelines Compliance

- [ ] `composer ai:check` passed locally
- [ ] No fabricated test results or command output
- [ ] No guessed files/routes/contracts were introduced
